items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: How've you been? Is life in Jinzhou treating you well? You know I'm here if you ever need anything.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Oh, Yangyang! What's there to be shy about? If you want to see {PlayerName}, just tell {Male=him;Female=her}!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: So, what have you been up to these past few days? Feelin' lonely without us around?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Wanna go see some fireworks? How about some Moon Shooting? With the festival just around the corner, there's a really cool spot we can take you to.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Yes. It'll be the Moon-Chasing Festival in a few days.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Though we celebrate this festival every year in Huanglong, given everything that has happened, this year's Moon-Chasing Festival in Jinzhou is sure to be quite special.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Yep, I caught them hanging lanterns all around City Hall. Every street and alley is gonna be glowing, I can't wait to see it all lit up!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: And we’ve got special Jinzhou traditions you won’t find anywhere else.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Like Taoyuan Vale! Folks go there a few days before the festival to write their wishes onto paper, then hang them on branches or toss 'em into Moontree Lodge.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: They say wishes made during these days are sure to come true. Works like a charm.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Wanna give it a go, {PlayerName}? All you gotta do is write down your wish, real simple! Yangyang, Baizhi and I are already here.
